text.title: Bun Project Setup and Native API Replacements
text.summary: Project initialization, configuration, and the list of Node.js packages to drop in favor of Bun built-ins.

rule.statement: Initialize Bun projects with bun init; pin the bun.lockb in version control.
rule.rationale: bun.lockb is Bun's binary lockfile; committing it ensures reproducible installs across machines and CI.

rule.statement: Do NOT install node-fetch, bcrypt, or dotenv in Bun projects; use native fetch, Bun.password, and Bun.env respectively.
rule.rationale: These packages add unnecessary size and potential incompatibilities; Bun's built-ins are faster and require no import.

antipattern.description: Installing and importing node-fetch in a Bun project.
antipattern.reason: Redundant — fetch is a global in Bun; importing node-fetch may cause version conflicts.
